name: Thermalright Peerless Assassin 120 SE ARGB CPU Air Cooler,6 Heat Pipes Aluminium Heatsink Cover, for Intel 1700/115X/1200, AMD AM4/AM5
description:
Product specificationCooler dimensions: L125 mm x W135 mm x H157 mm (4.92x5.31x6.18 inch); Heat sink material: Aluminum fin on copper bottom, CPU cooler is equipped with metal fasteners of Intel and AMD platform to achieve better installation.
PWM Fan SpecificationModel:TL-C12C-S FAN; Standard size PWM fan:120x120x25mm (4.7x4.7x0.98 inches); fan speed (RPM):1550rpm±10%; power port: 4pin; Air flow:66.17CFM(MAX); Noise Level25.6dB(A).
AGHP technique6×6mm heat pipes apply AGHP technique, Solve the Inverse gravity effect caused by vertical / horizontal orientation,6 pure copper sintered heat pipes & PWM fan & Pure copper base&Full electroplating reflow welding process, When CPU cooler works, match with ultra-silent airflow fans, aim to extreme CPU cooling performance.
CompatibilitySupport for Intel LGA 115X/1200/1700/17XX; AMD: AM4/AM5.
Thermalright Peerless Assassin 120 SE ARGB CPU Air Cooler,6 Heat Pipes Aluminium Heatsink Cover, for Intel 1700/115X/1200, AMD AM4/AM5

name: Thermalright Peerless Assassin 120 SE ARGB V2 CPU Air Cooler - 6 Heat Pipes AGHP GEN 5.0 Technology | 1850RPM PWM 120mm Fans, for Intel 1851/1700/115X/1200, AMD AM4/AM5 Black
description:
Thermalright Peerless Assassin 120 SE V2(PA120 SE V2)
[Product specification] Cooler dimensions: 125(L)x135(W)x155(H)mm (4.92x5.31x6.1 inch); Heat sink material: Aluminum fin on copper bottom, CPU cooler is equipped with metal fasteners of Intel and AMD platform to achieve better installation.
[Dual Thickened PWM Fans] TL-C12C-X28 V2 fan; fan size:120x120x28mm (4.7x4.7x1.1 inches); fan speed (RPM):1850rpm±10%; power port: 4pin; Air flow:88.19CFM(MAX); Noise Level29.5dB(A).
[AGHP GEN 5.0 Technology] 6×6mm heat pipes apply GEN 5.0 Technology, Solve the Inverse gravity effect caused by vertical | horizontal orientation, 6 pure copper heat pipes & PWM fan & Pure copper base&Full electroplating reflow welding process, TDP is is up to 265w, aim to extreme CPU cooling performance.
[Compatibility] The CPU cooling slot support:Intel LGA 1851/1700/1200/115X; AMD: AM4/AM5.

name: Noctua NF-A14x25r G2 PWM, Premium-Quality Quiet Round-frame 140mm PC Fan, 4-pin (Brown)
description:
Next-generation round-frame 140x25mm design for unprecedented quiet cooling performance on 14cm CPU coolers such as the NH-D15, NH-D15S or NH-U14S series
State-of-the-art engineering (Progressive-Bend impeller with winglets and Centrifugal Turbulator, Flow Acceleration Channels, AAO frame) and construction (Sterrox LCP, ultra-tight tip clearance)
4-pin PWM version for automatic speed control via 4-pin PWM motherboard fan headers, 300-1500rpm speed range (near-silent at idle, powerful under load), fan stops at 0% PWM (semi-passive option)
Includes anti-vibration mounts, fan screws, Low-Noise Adaptor (LNA), extension cable and y-cable for running two PWM fans on the same header
Trusted Noctua quality with premium-grade SSO2 bearing (MTTF > 150,000 h), safety certifications from UL and TÜV, protected against reverse polarity, over voltage and over current (short-circuits)
Noctua NF-A14x25r G2 PWM, Premium-Quality Quiet Round-frame 140mm PC Fan, 4-pin (Brown)
Noctua NF-A14x25r G2 PWM, Premium-Quality Quiet Round-frame 140mm PC Fan, 4-pin (Brown)

name: Noctua NF-A14x25r G2 PWM Sx2-PP, Push-Pull Set of two Premium-Quality Quiet 140mm PC Fans (Brown)
description:
Dedicated push-pull set (Sx2-PP) with two round-frame NF-A14x25r G2 PWM 140x25mm fans that are slightly off-set in speed (+/- ~25rpm) in order to avoid undesired acoustic interaction phenomena
State-of-the-art engineering (Progressive-Bend impeller with winglets and Centrifugal Turbulator, Flow Acceleration Channels, AAO frame) and construction (Sterrox LCP, ultra-tight tip clearance)
Ideal choice for push-pull applications on 14cm CPU coolers such as the NH-D15, NH-D15S or NH-U14S series, next-generation quiet cooling performance with unprecedented acoustic fine-tuning measures
Includes anti-vibration mounts, fan screws, Low-Noise Adaptors (LNA), extension cables and y-cable for running two fans on the same header
Trusted Noctua quality with premium-grade SSO2 bearing (MTTF > 150,000 h), safety certifications from UL and TÜV, protected against reverse polarity, over voltage and over current (short-circuits)
Noctua NF-A14x25r G2 PWM Sx2-PP, Push-Pull Set of two Premium-Quality Quiet 140mm PC Fans (Brown)
Noctua NF-A14x25r G2 PWM Sx2-PP, Push-Pull Set of two Premium-Quality Quiet 140mm PC Fans (Brown)

name: PCCOOLER CPS DS360 Display AIO CPU Liquid Cooler, 360mm Radiator, 315W TDP, ARGB LEDs & Customizable 2.4" IPS LCD Display, Ceramic Bearing, for Intel LGA 1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, Black
description:
Premium 315W Cooling Power: 27mm thick aluminum radiator paired with a next-gen pump for sustained thermal performance on high-end and overclocked CPUs. 
2.4" IPS LCD on Waterblock: 240×320 @60Hz full-color display with customizable themes and video playback for real-time temps, stats or animated logos. 
Triple F5 R120 OC ARGB Fans  Three 120mm high-airflow fans (up to 2500 RPM ±10%) delivering strong airflow and static pressure for aggressive cooling. 
Silent, High-Efficiency Pump: Precision ceramic shaft/sleeve and micro-channel design for quiet, reliable circulation under heavy loads. 
Universal Intel & AMD Support: Pre-installed brackets and 400mm sleeved tubing; fits Intel LGA 1851/1700/1200/115X and AMD AM5/AM4. 
Full ARGB Sync: Waterblock and fans use 5V 3-pin ARGB, compatible with major ecosystems.
3-Year Warranty
PCCOOLER CPS DS360 Display AIO CPU Liquid Cooler, 360mm Radiator, 315W TDP, ARGB LEDs & Customizable 2.4" IPS LCD Display, Ceramic Bearing, for Intel LGA 1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, Black
PCCOOLER CPS DS360 Display AIO CPU Liquid Cooler, 360mm Radiator, 315W TDP, ARGB LEDs & Customizable 2.4" IPS LCD Display, Ceramic Bearing, for Intel LGA 1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, Black

name: ARCTIC ACFRE00180A Liquid Freezer III Pro 360 AIO CPU Cooler, Water Cooling 38 mm Radiator, AMD AM5/AM4, Intel LGA1851/1700 (Black)
description:
CONTACT FRAME FOR INTEL LGA1851 | LGA1700: Optimized contact pressure distribution for a longer CPU lifespan and better heat dissipation
ARCTICS P12 PRO FAN: More performance at every speed  especially more powerful and quieter than the P12 at low speeds. Higher maximum speed for optimal cooling performance under high loads
NATIVE OFFSET MOUNTING FOR INTEL AND AMD: Shifting the cold plate center toward the CPU hotspot ensures more efficient heat transfer
INTEGRATED VRM FAN: PWM-controlled fan that lowers the temperature of the voltage regulators, ensuring reliable performance
INTEGRATED CABLE MANAGEMENT: The PWM cables of the radiator fans are integrated into the sleeve of the tubes, so only a single visible cable connects to the motherboard
ARCTIC ACFRE00180A Liquid Freezer III Pro 360 AIO CPU Cooler, Water Cooling 38 mm Radiator, AMD AM5/AM4, Intel LGA1851/1700 (Black)
ARCTIC ACFRE00180A Liquid Freezer III Pro 360 AIO CPU Cooler, Water Cooling 38 mm Radiator, AMD AM5/AM4, Intel LGA1851/1700 (Black)

name: CZQEPMB ARGB Liquid CPU Cooler,Water Cooler with Temperature Display, 360mm Digital CPU Mute Cooler ARGB & PWM Chassis Fan,LGA115X/1200/1700/1366/2011/2066,AM5/AM4/AM3/AM2/FM2/FM1/939,Gaming
description:
Better Cooling: Large pure copper base allows heat to be effectively transferred from CPU. High density waterway aluminum fin cold plate + FEP protective polymer water pipe + standard 120 mm ARGB fan ensure a steady circulation of coolant, keeping CPU and case super chill. 
ARGB Divine Light Synchronization: Synchronized with the 5 V 3 pin on the motherboard, the ARGB of the fan and cpu water cooler head can provide rich dynamic lighting effects. 
Dual PWM Fans: Standard 120mm PWM fans, the speed can reach 2000 RPM±10%, which can be set to automatically adjust according to CPU temperature, providing better airflow and lower noise. 
Compatibility with Most Modern Cases: Support Intel: 115X/1200/1366/1700/2011/2066 AMD SOcKet AM5/AM4/AM3+/AM3/AM2+/AM2/FM2+/FM2/FM1/939, with dual platform black buckle, easier to access and install around the CPU. And the compact size can fit in the majority of PC cases

name: ARCTIC Liquid Freezer WS360-4710: Workstation AIO Liquid Cooler, Intel LGA4710/4677, 3 x P12 Pro CO Fans, Dual Ball Bearing, High Static Pressure, 360 mm Thick Radiator, PWM Pump, Fixed mounting
description:
Designed for Superior Cooling, Optimized for Workstations: The Liquid Freezer WS360-4710 delivers outstanding cooling under heavy loads while keeping noise levels comparable to competing solutions.
P12 Pro PST CO - Performance & Durability: The ARCTIC's P12 Pro PST CO pair the High Static Pressure Performance of the P12 Pro with Dual Ball Bearings engineered for continuous 24/7 operation.
Premium-Class Radiator: Liquid coolers with 38mm radiators offer superior thermal dissipation, and we continued integrating this design into our workstation models.
Water Block Design for Workstation CPU: The water block is a brand new design with high-density micro fins, efficient chamber flow, and a durable pump for long-lasting reliability.
MX-7 - Ultimate Performance Thermal Paste: Bundled with MX-7, ARCTIC's Premium Thermal Paste, designed to Maximize Thermal performance and long-term reliability.

name: CORSAIR NAUTILUS 360 RS Liquid CPU Cooler – RS120 Fans – Fits Intel® LGA 1851/1700, AMD®  AM5/AM4 – Simple Daisy-Chain - Direct Motherboard Connection
description:
Simple, High-Performance All-in-One CPU Cooling: Renowned CORSAIR engineering delivers strong, low-noise cooling that helps your CPU reach its full potential.
Efficient, Low-Noise Pump: Keeps your coolant circulating at a high flow rate while generating a whisper-quiet 20 dBA.
Convex Cold Plate with Pre-Applied Thermal Paste: The slightly convex shape ensures maximum contact with your CPU’s integrated heat spreader, with thermal paste applied in an optimized pattern to speed up installation.
RS120 Fans: RS fans create strong airflow with the high static pressure necessary to drive air through the radiator. CORSAIR AirGuide technology and Magnetic Dome bearings ensure great cooling performance and low noise.
Wide Compatibility: Supports a wide range of Intel® and AMD® socket types, including the latest cutting-edge LGA 1851.
CORSAIR NAUTILUS 360 RS Liquid CPU Cooler – RS120 Fans – Fits Intel® LGA 1851/1700, AMD®  AM5/AM4 – Simple Daisy-Chain - Direct Motherboard Connection

name: NZXT KRAKEN PLUS 280 MM AIO LIQUID COOLER WITH 1.54" LCD & STATIC PRESSURE FANS
description:
TURBINE POWERED: The custom-designed pump maximizes flow rate
and head pressure, resulting in powerful and efficient cooling performance.
CUSTOMIZABLE SQUARE LCD: Display custom images, GIFs, or track system
specs in real time on the 1.54-inch 240 × 240 resolution with a 30 Hz refresh rate screen.
QUIET PERFORMANCE: Equipped with quiet and durable high static
pressure fans for strong airflow with Zero RPM Mode for silence at low loads.
SPLIT-FLOW COLD PLATE: Copper cold plate maximizes cooling by
efficiently directing coolant to the hottest areas of the CPU for maximum heat dissipation.
BUILT-IN RGB & FAN CONTROLLER: A single breakout cable from the cap provides all connections to the built-in fan and RGB controller, simplifying installation and reducing clutter.
CPU COMPATIBILITY: Comes with sockets and brackets for the latest CPU chipsets: Intel® LGA 1851, 1700, 1200, 115X and AMD® AM5, AM4.
NZXT KRAKEN PLUS 280 MM AIO LIQUID COOLER WITH 1.54" LCD & STATIC PRESSURE FANS

description:
Customizable 2.4" IPS Display: Enjoy a crisp 240 x 320 resolution at 60Hz with customizable themes and video playback, offering a personalized monitoring experience.
High-Performance F5 R120 OC ARGB Fan: Operates between 500~2500 RPM (±10%), delivering up to 4.07 mmH2O static pressure and 90.56 CFM airflow for efficient, quiet cooling.
Advanced OC PLUS V1.0 Pump Structure: Features a durable ceramic shaft and sleeve with ultra-precision micro channels for superior heat dissipation and low noise.
Effortless Installation: Comes with a pre-installed fan, quick-release waterblock bracket, and simplified accessories for fast, hassle-free setup.
Broad Compatibility: Fully supports AMD AM5/AM4 and Intel LGA1851/1700/1200/115X platforms for versatile PC builds.
3-Year Warranty: Provides long-term reliability and peace of mind with a comprehensive 3-year warranty.

description:

CAM information with particle density animations.
TWICE AS BRIGHT: A bright 2.36" wide angle LCD screen supports custom images along with animated GIFs and features a crystal clear 640x640 display resolution, double that of previous generations.
STAY COOL: Luminously quiet F Series RGB Core fans give a vibrant feel to your 
gaming setup with the 8 individually addressable RGB LEDs on each fan. The 7th gen Asetek pump ensures your Kraken Elite cools optimally with 2800 RPM operation.
SIMPLE INSTALL: Setup is made simple with a single breakout cable that takes the guesswork out of the installation process
NZXT CAM-READY: Personalize screen content with custom images, GIFs, or performance info with user-friendly NZXT CAM software. You can also control fan and pump speeds and run at 0 RPM mode at low temperatures to eliminate fan noise.

Powerful 3-chamber pump design significantly reduces turbulences and noise

name: ASUS ROG RYUO IV SLC 360 ARGB White Edition All-in-one AIO Liquid CPU Cooler, 200mm short water,3D visual effects, curved 6.67'' AMOLED screen and ROG AF 12C ARGB fan, AMD AM4/AM5 & Intel LGA1851/1700
model: ROG RYUO IV SLC 360 ARGB - WHTTE
description:
A removable curved 6.67-inch AMOLED display supports top-of-the-line video playback and customized system information display. 
Pre-installed tandem ARGB fans feature front and side lighting. 
200mm Shortened water cooling tube design creates a sleek aesthetic.
*Compatible ASUS cases: ROG Hyperion GR701/ROG Strix Helios GX601/ProArt PA602/TUF Gaming GT502/TUF Gaming GT302(The latest compatibility list is available on the official website.)
*Third-party cases must support a 420mm radiator.
*Recommended case top width: 70mm-100mm
ASUS ROG RYUO IV SLC 360 ARGB White Edition All-in-one AIO Liquid CPU Cooler, 200mm short water,3D visual effects, curved 6.67'' AMOLED screen and ROG AF 12C ARGB fan, AMD AM4/AM5 & Intel LGA1851/1700

name: ASUS ROG Ryuo IV SLC 360 ARGB MIKU Edition All-in-one AIO Liquid CPU Cooler, 200mm short water,curved 6.67'' AMOLED screen, 3D visual effects, AMD AM4/AM5 & Intel LGA1851/1700
description:
The ROG JI x Hatsune Miku collaboration perfectly blends ROG's superior performance with sci-fi aesthetics, featuring Hatsune Miku's classic turquoise and pink color scheme.
It boasts a movable curved 6.67-inch AMOLED screen, supporting 3D video playback and customized system information display.
Pre-installed series ARGB fans provide high airflow, high static pressure, and low noise, and feature front and side lighting effects.
The 200mm shortened water cooling tubing design creates a sleek and streamlined appearance.
Intuitive and easy-to-use customization software supports hardware monitoring and includes screen content management tools.
A powerful pump delivers excellent cooling performance, higher flow rates, and lower impedance.
*Compatible ASUS cases: ROG Hyperion GR701/ROG Strix Helios GX601/ProArt PA602/TUF Gaming GT502/TUF Gaming GT302 (For the latest compatibility list, please visit the ASUS website.)
*Third-party cases must support a 420mm radiator.
*Recommended case top width: 70mm-100mm
